plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic run because it attempted to click a dismiss button (text '×') that was no longer present or had a different selector than what was stored in the cache.
observedIndicators: failure during page.ai call with cached selectors
historical pass rate is low (0.43) suggesting environmental flakiness or frequent UI changes

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test. This will force the autonomous agent to find a new path to the objective without relying on the stale selector for the dismiss button.

plan.notes: The failure occurred during the first page.ai call. The cached instructions included a step to click a '×' button, likely to dismiss a banner or modal that appeared in previous runs (such as the 'Rocky AI' banner seen in the failure screenshot). Since the selector failed and this was a deterministic run, clearing the cache will allow the AI to re-evaluate the page state and find the correct path to the 'Resources' menu.
